context: Evaluates the agent's ability to cross-reference ADR files on disk against the index.yaml registry and report discrepancies.

checklist.name: ADR files enumerated
checklist.description: Agent lists all adr-NNN-*.md files under docs/ADR/

checklist.name: Index entries parsed
checklist.description: Agent reads docs/ADR/index.yaml and extracts registered ADR filenames

checklist.name: Unregistered ADRs detected
checklist.description: Agent identifies ADR files not listed in index.yaml

checklist.name: Stale index entries detected
checklist.description: Agent identifies index.yaml entries referencing files that no longer exist

checklist.name: Remediation provided
checklist.description: Agent suggests adding missing entries or removing stale entries from index.yaml
